summary: Tested DoggyBakeryCakeModal (breed cake order flow), breed-cake-banner, Breed Cakes strip pill, ServicesPage price hiding, ServicesSoulPage all-services listing. 11/12 feature tests PASS. 1 feature untestable (FitPage) due to routing — /fit loads PlaySoulPage not FitPage. Key critical issue: FitPage.jsx changes are dead code since no route points to FitPage.

ui_bugs.issue: Trailing */} inside JSX after self-closing components: '<ArchetypeProducts .../> */}' and '<CuratedBundles .../> */}'. Syntax errors — harmless since FitPage is unrouted, but need cleanup.

integration_issues.issue: ROUTING MISMATCH: /fit route (App.js line 614) maps to PlaySoulPage not FitPage. The price change in FitPage.jsx ServiceDetailModal (line 257: 'Concierge® will advise price') is dead code — FitPage is imported but never routed. Test requirement 'FitPage (/fit) — service detail shows Concierge® will advise price' cannot be verified via UI. Main agent needs to either: (a) restore /fit route to use FitPage, or (b) apply the same price change to PlaySoulPage's service detail component.

ROUTING: /services uses ServicesSoulPage via ProtectedRoute (App.js line 631) which takes priority over ServicesPage at line 652. The 'Personalised · Price on request' change in ServicesPage.jsx is not visible to logged-in users. However, ServicesSoulPage doesn't show prices at all (cards show 'Book via Concierge →'), so the net effect is correct — no ₹ amounts shown to users.

test_1_breed_cake_banner.text_check: A cake that looks like Mojo 🎂

test_7_fish_allergen_note.text: 🐟 Fish = Salmon · Safe for most dogs · Not suitable if fish-allergic

test_10_order_btn.disabled_when_no_illus: N/A (all tested breeds have auto-loaded illustrations)
test_10_order_btn.note: Indie and Poodle breeds both have illustrations and auto-select; order btn enabled. Code logic disabled={!selIllus} is correct.

test_13_services_soul_all_services.note: Previously filtered to priced-only (74 shown). Filter removed — now shows all 337.

test_14_fit_page_concierge_price.action_needed: FitPage.jsx has correct change but is not routed. Route /fit points to PlaySoulPage.

action_items: MEDIUM: /fit route (App.js line 614) points to PlaySoulPage not FitPage — the 'Concierge® will advise price' change in FitPage.jsx ServiceDetailModal is not accessible. Either (a) update /fit route to use FitPage, or (b) apply the same price change to PlaySoulPage's service booking component.
LOW: FitPage.jsx lines 979, 986 — trailing */} inside JSX after self-closing components (syntax error, harmless since file is unrouted but should be cleaned up)

LOW: ServicesPage 'Personalised · Price on request' change is technically dead code at /services for logged-in users (ServicesSoulPage wins), but net effect is correct since ServicesSoulPage also hides prices. No user-visible issue.
critical_code_review_comments: FitPage.jsx is DEAD CODE — imported (App.js line 241) but never used in any route. Routes for /fit and /fit/* both map to PlaySoulPage. All changes made to FitPage.jsx are invisible to users.
App.js line 652: ServicesPage route at /services is dead code — the ProtectedRoute version (line 631: ServicesSoulPage) always wins in React Router v6 first-match-wins routing.
FitPage.jsx syntax errors at lines 979 and 986: JSX has '*/}' which is a leftover from a comment removal — should be '/>\n' not '/> */}'

success_rate.frontend: 92% (11/12 testable features pass; 1 feature untestable due to routing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: DoggyBakeryCakeModal fully working: breed-cake-banner at /celebrate, Breed Cakes strip pill, modal features (8 flavours with correct prices, Oats/Ragi base, fish allergen note, price pill updates, message input max 30 chars, close button). ServicesSoulPage at /services shows all 337 services without prices. FitPage.jsx changes NOT accessible — /fit uses PlaySoulPage. Auth: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 (JWT: tdb_auth_token in localStorage). Mojo pet is Indie breed.
rca_of_issues: The FitPage routing issue: App.js defines Route path='/fit' twice — line 614 maps to PlaySoulPage (first match wins in React Router v6), so FitPage is never rendered. This was likely the result of migrating /fit to use PlaySoulPage while forgetting to update the FitPage reference in the same file.
